danger_signals.meaning: Player failure state approaching; mistakes accumulate as penalty

danger_signals.visual_form: Instructor animation mismatch or visual feedback negation
danger_signals.meaning: Player out of sync with choreography; immediate danger to score
Failure condition triggered; song/routine terminated in Normal Mode

safety_signals.visual_form: Score increase or maintenance; instructor animation reinforcement
safety_signals.meaning: Player synchronized with choreography; safe progression state
Guidance present; player has reference for correct action

safety_signals.visual_form: Audio/visual sync in Aerobics Mode despite score zero
safety_signals.meaning: Safe failure state; game permits continued play without harsh termination

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Power Pad foot position on mat
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Central two buttons as standing position; surrounding 10 pads as action zones
Studio environment (Studio 5, Studio 10, Studio 15, Studio 20 locations)

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Score counter displayed, decrements on error, increments on success
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Instructor performs choreography; player must mirror movements; failure terminates at zero score

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Same studio environments and instructor animation as Normal Mode
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Score counter reaches zero but game continues; music persists; no level progression or unlocks

world_state_to_visual.world_state: Pad Antics Mode / Tune Up active
world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Central pads deactivated; surrounding 10 pads mapped to musical notes
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Freeform composition; player generates melodies; no failure condition

world_state_to_visual.world_state: Pad Antics Mode / Mat Melodies active
world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Game displays short musical sequence; player stands on center pads
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player must reproduce exact sequence order; memory-based challenge

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Game displays hand/foot instructions; Twister-like spatial constraints
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player executes mixed limb commands; coordination challenge

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: New aerobics classes become selectable in Normal Mode menu
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player progression allows access to 4 additional classes beyond initial 4

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Instructor choreography increases in tempo and complexity
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Song difficulty rises as levels progress; harder routines require faster response

environmental_storytelling.example: Four numbered studio environments (Studio 5, 10, 15, 20) suggest progressive difficulty/intensity tiers
Aerobics instructor leads player through choreography, establishing power dynamic of guidance/compliance
Score starting at 100 and decreasing creates implicit risk/failure narrative; player must maintain health/performance metric
Three distinct modes (Normal, Pad Antics, Aerobics) represent different studio environments/teaching methods without explicit story

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Performs aerobics moves; provides visual reference for player mirroring
Animation complexity increases with difficulty; tempo accelerates
Score points accumulate; instructor animation reinforces synchronization
Score decreases by 10-point penalty; visual/audio feedback indicates missed step
Music stops; routine terminates when score reaches zero
Music continues; no termination penalty; player may resume attempts indefinitely

notes: Dance Aerobics is a non-narrative fitness/rhythm game with minimal world-building. Communication of state relies entirely on mechanical feedback (scoring, instructor animation, audio sync) rather than environmental narrative or faction conflict. The game lacks danger/safety dynamics in traditional game sense; instead, communication centers on performance metrics (score degradation as 'danger') and instructor presence as 'safety' (guidance). Faction indicators are minimal: only instructor vs. player relationship exists. Power Pad interface design creates the primary world-state communication method. Game paradigm is 'other' (fitness/exercise) rather than traditional action/narrative.
